response.justification: Although the candidate is a highly skilled full-stack developer with extensive experience in TypeScript, Node.js, and Dlang, they do not meet the core requirements for this position. The role mandates 5-10 years of C++ development on Windows and deep expertise in Capital Markets or Fixed Income, neither of which are adequately present in the candidate's professional history.
strengths: Demonstrates over 10 years of broad software engineering experience across diverse tech stacks.
Possesses strong hands-on experience with CI/CD pipelines, Docker, and DevOps tooling.
Has some exposure to the investment sector through a previous software development role in Germany.
concerns: Fails to meet the mandatory requirement of 5-10 years of C++ development on the Windows platform.
Lacks the required Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking domain expertise.
No demonstrated experience with enterprise SQL Server or Oracle databases.
